hypothesis: Converting open_lane.py mode= from WARN to ERROR for 2nd+ wave lanes will enforce campaign mode transitions at creation time
method: Code change in open_lane.py: get_frontier_previous_mode() now returns (mode, wave_count). Enforcement block at line 205 exits with ERROR when --mode is omitted for frontiers with prior lanes. Mode-repeat WARN preserved. First-wave lanes unaffected.

context.theoretical_basis: L-601: voluntary protocols decay to structural floor at creation. L-775: tool-enforced ~90% vs specification-only ~3%

verdict: Structural enforcement gate implemented and tested. 4/4 test cases pass. Prospective measurement: track mode= adoption in lanes opened S394+ to verify enforcement works in practice.
